overview: Elite personal portfolio for Bomalleeni Rajesh Kumar — a hacker terminal meets neon developer aesthetic with an interactive command-line system, animated sections, and a striking visual identity.
features: Interactive terminal with command history and navigation
Canvas particle background with scanline overlay
12 animated sections (hero, about, skills, projects, contact, and more)
Neon cyan + green design system with JetBrains Mono typography
Click-to-copy contact cards, resume download, count-up stats
